concept: A coding workspace protected from poisoned rule changes
prompt: Text-free square cinematic technical artwork, stacked repository and rule planes with one altered plane isolated before it reaches the agent path, matte graphite geometry, translucent evidence planes, deep navy atmosphere, restrained cyan green amber and red signals, controlled depth, sparse haze, meaningful subject protected inside the central 60 percent, no people, no logos, no dashboards, no words, no letters, no numbers
alt: Repository rule planes with one altered layer isolated from the agent path
cropNotes: Keep the isolated layer obvious without using warning text or recognizable file icons

concept: An isolated agent chamber with constrained network egress
prompt: Text-free square cinematic technical artwork, an agent-like processing core inside a graphite isolation chamber with one filtered egress channel, matte graphite geometry, translucent evidence planes, deep navy atmosphere, restrained cyan green amber and red signals, controlled depth, sparse haze, meaningful subject protected inside the central 60 percent, no people, no logos, no dashboards, no words, no letters, no numbers
alt: A processing core inside an isolation chamber with one filtered egress path
cropNotes: Keep chamber walls and filtered egress visible in landscape and portrait crops

concept: Untrusted instructions propagating across agent and rules planes while the control path remains isolated
prompt: Text-free square cinematic technical artwork, an untrusted red instruction signal attempting to propagate across several separated agent and repository-rules planes while a hardened trust boundary isolates the privileged control path, matte graphite geometry, translucent evidence planes, deep navy atmosphere, restrained cyan green amber and red signals, controlled depth, sparse haze, meaningful subject protected inside the central 60 percent, no people, no logos, no dashboards, no words, no letters, no numbers
alt: Untrusted instructions crossing agent and rules planes while the control path remains isolated
cropNotes: Keep several instruction planes, the propagation path, trust boundary, and isolated control path inside the central 60 percent; show no readable prompt or interface text

concept: A private application workspace separated from an external assistant channel
prompt: Text-free square cinematic technical artwork, a protected data chamber separated by a translucent privacy boundary from an external assistant path, matte graphite geometry, translucent evidence planes, deep navy atmosphere, restrained cyan green amber and red signals, controlled depth, sparse haze, meaningful subject protected inside the central 60 percent, no people, no logos, no dashboards, no words, no letters, no numbers
alt: A protected data chamber separated from an external assistant path
cropNotes: Keep the privacy boundary and both sides visible; avoid depicting real user data
